label: KEEP_RESIDUAL_TAIL_LEDGER_CONTEXT_VERIFIER_READY

join_policy: Fallback only to bounded condition_id+side+trigger_ts_ms+trigger_px+trigger_size context match.
Name unmatched examples and missing join keys instead of fabricating quote/order/source_sequence ids.
checks: local candidate external shadow ids remain unavailable and blank

decision_behavior.KEEP: required fields present, exemplar score ready, join coverage and context deltas pass, pair/residual contexts present, and private/promotion guards false
decision_behavior.UNKNOWN: selected/export/exemplar join or required field gaps are present and named
decision_behavior.DISCARD: guardrail failure such as unsafe paths or local candidate export unexpectedly claiming external shadow ids

promotion_gate.reason: local verifier readiness only; not no-order shadow, source-truth replay, strategy economics, private truth, deployable, canary, or promotion evidence

next_action: If no exact remote approval is given, use this verifier contract to define one local sample-preserving ledger/context mechanism candidate; if late_repair90_residual_tail_exemplar_no_order_review is explicitly approved and completed, run the exemplar scorer, selector, and this verifier before proposing any mechanism.
